nodes.name: pr.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs on pull requests to master, enforcing lockfile hygiene, validating Dockerfile deps stage and release package manifests, running tests and type checks across the monorepo, and building the Docker image.

nodes.name: refresh-lockfile.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that automatically refreshes the pnpm lockfile on pushes to master and opens a pull request with the updated lockfile, ensuring the CI-owned lockfile stays current.

nodes.name: release-smoke.yml
nodes.summary: Reusable and manually-triggered GitHub Actions smoke test workflow that installs a published Paperclip dist-tag (canary or latest) inside a Docker container and validates the running server, uploading diagnostics as an artifact.

nodes.name: release.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions release workflow that publishes canary packages on every push to master and supports manual stable releases with date-based versioning, including Docker image publishing and downstream smoke test triggering.

nodes.name: .mailmap
nodes.summary: Git mailmap file that normalizes contributor names and email addresses for consistent attribution in git log output.

nodes.name: .npmrc
nodes.summary: npm/pnpm configuration file that sets registry or workspace preferences for the monorepo package publishing workflow.

nodes.name: adapter-plugin.md
nodes.summary: Developer guide explaining how to build custom adapter plugins for Paperclip, covering the adapter interface contract, plugin registration, and integration patterns for connecting external AI agent runtimes.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive engineering guidelines for AI coding agents working on the Paperclip repo, covering repo map, dev setup, database change workflow, API/auth/UI expectations, PR requirements, definition of done, and fork-specific notes.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Automated changelog for the paperclipai CLI package tracking patch and minor releases from v0.2.1 through v0.3.1 with detailed per-version change descriptions.

nodes.name: esbuild.config.mjs
nodes.summary: esbuild configuration for bundling the paperclipai CLI into a single ESM file, inlining all internal @paperclipai workspace packages while keeping external npm dependencies as runtime requirements.
nodes.languageNotes: Dynamically reads each workspace package.json to build the external dependency list, distinguishing between bundled workspace packages and runtime-resolved ones like @paperclipai/server.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the paperclipai CLI, declaring the binary entry point, npm publish configuration, build/test scripts, and runtime dependencies including commander, zod, and various @paperclipai workspace packages.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Primary project README and documentation hub for Paperclip, covering the platform overview, quickstart guide, features, use cases, FAQ, development setup, roadmap, community, and contributing guidelines.

nodes.name: agent-jwt-env.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests verifying that agent JWT environment variable injection works correctly when the CLI reads configuration, ensuring auth tokens are properly propagated to agent processes.

nodes.name: allowed-hostname.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests that validate the allowed-hostname allowlist feature in CLI configuration, verifying that hostname validation is correctly enforced from config file settings.

nodes.name: auth-command-registration.test.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal test that verifies the auth command is correctly registered in the CLI command tree and appears in the help output.

nodes.name: board-auth.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for the board authentication flow in the CLI, verifying that auth credentials are read from and written to the correct file paths.

nodes.name: common.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for shared CLI utility functions covering common helpers used across multiple commands, using temp directories to isolate file system side effects.

nodes.name: company-delete.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the company delete CLI command, verifying correct deletion behavior and error handling against a mock company fixture.

nodes.name: company-import-export-e2e.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive end-to-end tests for the company import and export CLI commands, spinning up a real Paperclip server against a test PostgreSQL database and exercising the full roundtrip of importing and exporting company data.
nodes.languageNotes: Spawns child processes for both the server and CLI, dynamically finds available ports, and polls for server readiness — a heavyweight integration harness that tests real CLI/server interaction.

nodes.name: getAvailablePort
nodes.summary: Finds a free TCP port by creating a temporary server, binding to port 0, and resolving with the OS-assigned port number before closing.

nodes.name: writeTestConfig
nodes.summary: Generates a complete Paperclip server configuration JSON file at a temp path, wiring together port, database connection string, and path overrides needed for isolated e2e test runs.

nodes.name: createServerEnv
nodes.summary: Builds the process environment object for spawning the Paperclip server in tests, stripping conflicting env vars and injecting the config path, port, and database connection string.

nodes.name: runCliJson
nodes.summary: Executes the CLI binary as a child process with given args and returns parsed JSON from stdout, handling the JSON output boundary within mixed stdout streams.

nodes.name: waitForServer
nodes.summary: Polls the server health endpoint repeatedly until it responds successfully or a timeout expires, providing test readiness synchronization for the spawned server process.

nodes.name: company-import-url.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for importing a company from a remote URL via the CLI, verifying that URL-based import correctly fetches and processes the remote company definition.

nodes.name: company-import-zip.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for the zip-based company import CLI command, verifying that local zip archives are correctly unpacked and their contents loaded as company definitions.

nodes.name: company.test.ts
nodes.summary: Extensive unit and integration tests for the company CLI commands, covering listing, creating, updating, and inspecting companies with a wide range of scenarios and edge cases.

nodes.name: context.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for CLI context management, verifying that context configuration is correctly read from and written to isolated temp directories.

nodes.name: data-dir.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for the CLI data directory resolution logic, ensuring correct paths are computed across different operating systems and configuration states.

nodes.name: doctor.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for the CLI doctor command, which validates the health of a Paperclip configuration and reports issues with missing or misconfigured fields.

nodes.name: createTempConfig
nodes.summary: Builds a complete temporary Paperclip configuration directory tree with all required config files, used as the baseline fixture for doctor command test cases.
